creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 223941
net/coturn: make mysql support optional

Hi,

From my experience (and usage), I've found that coturn mysql support can be disabled. Would you consider making it an option (that can be leaved by default of course)?

Here's a quick patch to do so, it's only a matter of defining the option and configure arguments -- no changes to the plist.

Thanks for providing this package, have a nice day.
